package.episode_title: The Secret Life of the Aye-Aye
package.hook: This tiny mammal hunts faster than the human eye can follow.
package.summary: A short cinematic wildlife documentary episode about how the star-nosed mole uses its strange nose as a biological radar system to hunt in complete darkness.

scenes.narration: Beneath the wet soil of North America, a creature searches in total darkness.
scenes.image_prompt: BBC Earth style macro wildlife documentary shot, wet underground tunnel, star-nosed mole moving through dark soil, natural textures, cinematic lighting, no humans
scenes.video_prompt: 5-second macro wildlife documentary shot, star-nosed mole moving through a damp underground tunnel, subtle handheld camera feel, shallow depth of field, no humans
scenes.camera_style: Macro close-up, shallow depth of field, slow push-in feeling
scenes.sound_design: Low soil movement, soft rumble, quiet underground ambience

scenes.narration: Its nose is not just strange. It is one of the fastest touch organs in the animal kingdom.
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme macro shot of star-nosed mole nose tentacles, wet pink sensory rays, dark natural background, high-detail wildlife documentary style
scenes.video_prompt: 6-second extreme macro wildlife shot, sensory rays twitching rapidly as the mole scans the tunnel floor, cinematic natural lighting, no humans
scenes.camera_style: Extreme macro detail shot, locked camera, intense focus on the nose
scenes.sound_design: Tiny clicks, soft organic movement, subtle tension pulse

package.thumbnail_prompt: Cinematic macro thumbnail of a star-nosed mole emerging from dark wet soil, strange nose clearly visible, dramatic documentary lighting, high detail, no text
package.caption: This mole hunts with a living radar hidden beneath the soil.

package.hook: A ghost walks the jungle floor.
package.caption: Nature's perfect camouflage.

scenes.narration: In the shadow-dappled forests of South America...
scenes.image_prompt: Ocelot stepping through jungle shadows, dappled light on spotted coat
scenes.video_prompt: Tracking shot following ocelot through underbrush

scenes.narration: Its rosette pattern dissolves into the filtered light...
scenes.image_prompt: Ocelot frozen mid-step, camouflage pattern blending with light spots on forest floor
scenes.video_prompt: Slow push-in as ocelot becomes nearly invisible against patterned background
scenes.camera_style: Slow dolly in, shallow depth of field
